name: cloudflare-shard-tpcc-benchmark
description: TPC-C-derived OLTP demo/benchmark for CloudflareShard (issue #16), adapted to this project's mutate/tx/index-query/table-scan HTTP primitives. Not the literal TPC-DS benchmark originally suggested, and not an official/certifiable TPC-C submission -- see src/generate.mjs and src/transactions.mjs for documented deviations.
